content.situation: 你的同事刚刚在团队会议上展示了新的客户提案，你希望当面称赞他的专业表现。
content.speakerText: I just walked through the client proposal with the team.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚在团队会议上展示了客户提案。
content.responseTemplate: ___! The structure and visuals really made the difference.
content.hint: 用一个表达强烈赞赏的短语开头，强调对方的卓越表现
content.knowledgePoint: 职场中表达具体赞赏的句型

content.situation: 你的同事主动承担了紧急任务并提前完成，你希望在茶水间当面肯定他的责任感和效率。
content.speakerText: I managed to get the deadline moved up—glad it worked out.
content.speakerTextCn: 我设法提前完成了任务，很高兴顺利解决了。
content.responseTemplate: ___—you really stepped up when it counted.

blanks.answer: That’s exactly what I mean by leadership
options: That’s exactly what I mean by leadership
That’s not bad for a first try

content.hint: 用一个肯定对方担当和专业精神的表达，突出关键时刻的表现
content.knowledgePoint: 肯定他人责任感与专业态度的表达方式

content.situation: 你看到同事在跨部门协作中出色地调解了矛盾，让项目重回正轨，你想真诚地赞美他的沟通能力。
content.speakerText: I just helped align the marketing and engineering teams after the miscommunication.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚帮市场部和工程部解决了沟通误会，让他们重新对齐了。
content.responseTemplate: ___—you turned a potential disaster into a win.

options: I think it was just luck

content.hint: 用一个表达高度认可的短语，强调对方在复杂情况下的出色应对
content.knowledgePoint: 赞美他人解决冲突与协调能力的常用表达
